content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor appeared in the Battle Realm Tower and came to Ye Tian's face.

"Ye Tian, are you looking for me?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked.

He saw that Ye Tian's cultivation was no longer the Supreme Domain Ancestor, but the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Then he continued: "It shouldn't be a matter of you breaking through to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, right?"

"Lord Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, naturally it's not something I broke through, but I have a treasure that I want to trade to the Battle Gate, but this treasure is relatively expensive, so I need Lord Fire Emblem War Ancestor to come forward!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian took out the Space Saint Endowment Crystal.

As soon as the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor saw this Spatial Saint Fu Crystal, he was immediately shocked and said, "The Saint Fortune Stone, and it is also the Space Saint Endowment Stone, you actually have this treasure?"

"Is it called the Holy Stone?"

Ye Tian felt that his name was quite accurate, but he just added an extra crystal word.

"You've used up some of your Spatial Sacred Endowment Stones, and only one Sacred Endowment is left, right?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor suddenly asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian admitted: "I have given our human race some genius space endowments, leaving only one place, ready to trade to the battle gate, the battle gate should be interested, right?"

"Hahaha, of course Zhanmen is interested, even I am interested, there are many heirs under my command who do not have holy endowments, you can trade it directly to me, how about it?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked.

"Yes, but I hope that the Fire Emblem War Ancestor can pass on the transaction information!" Ye Tian proposed.

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor was stunned for a moment, and then smiled.

He knew Ye Tian's purpose, so he nodded: "Okay, I'll let people know, you don't have to worry about your human race giving birth to so many saints!"

"Thank you, Lord Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and the Fire Emblem War Ancestor completed the transaction.

The Space Saint Fu Stone belonged to the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, and Ye Tian obtained a very precious treasure from the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor - Mixed Ancestor Water.

Mixed Ancestor Water is a very precious cultivation resource, which is of great help to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and can allow the Invincible Domain Ancestor to quickly refine the Invincible Domain Body.

As long as the Mixed Ancestor Water is refined, you can be promoted from the early stage of the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm to the consummation level of the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm, and you don't need to refine the Invincible Domain Body for endless years, and slowly improve your cultivation.

Therefore, for the Invincible Domain Ancestor who has just been promoted, once he has the Mixed Ancestor Water, he can quickly improve his strength and raise his cultivation to the consummation level of the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Other resources were not of much help to Ye Tian, perhaps others were more eager to obtain treasures that could add a trace of breaking the extreme of the physical body, such as turning the Holy Body into an ancestral body, and turning the Holy Skill into an Ancestral Technique.

But Ye Tian didn't need these treasures, he needed treasures like Mixed Ancestor Water even more.

Once he uses the Mixed Ancestor Water to improve his cultivation, his combat power is enough to increase to a terrifying level.

For example, he has just broken through to the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm now, and his combat power has been directly promoted to the extreme combat power of the three-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, which is only one step away from the second-step Invincible Domain Ancestor's combat power.

If he breaks through to the Invincible Domain Ancestor Consummation Realm, his combat power is directly comparable to that of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, and that is beyond the combat power of the Invincible Domain Ancestor by one step!

After the transaction, Ye Tian used his Natal Ancestral Fu to take a look at the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor's ancestral technique.

【Ancestral Skill: Fire Emblem Body】

For this ancestral skill, Ye Tianke has seen it.

At the beginning, the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor performed this ancestral skill, and became a terrifying existence comparable to the size of the domain realm, defeating a peerless domain ancestor of the same level with a single blow, how terrifying the power was.

Of course, this ancestral skill is actually average, but the cultivation of the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor is high, so it can burst out with such terrifying power.

"Copy it, it might be useful in the future!"

Ye Tian casually copied this ancestral technique.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Battle Realm Tower, returned to the Holy Tablet World, and began to cultivate.

He took out a small bottle of Mixed Ancestor Water, took out a drop and swallowed it in his stomach, and began to refine the Mixed Ancestor Water.

Rumble!!!!!

The terrifying energy tempered Ye Tian's invincible domain body, and his invincible domain body was quickly tempered and improved.

"It's such a terrifying enhancement effect, even the ancestral medicine is useless to me, but the mixed ancestral water has such a terrifying effect, the value of this drop alone is more precious than an ordinary holy relic!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He continued to cultivate, refining drop after drop of mixed ancestor water, and his cultivation was also making rapid progress!

Invincible Domain Ancestor Early Stage!

Invincible Domain Ancestor Mid-Stage!

Invincible Domain Ancestor Late Stage!

The Invincible Domain Ancestor is a great consummation!

When Ye Tian completely raised his cultivation to the Invincible Domain Ancestor Perfection Realm, there was still one-tenth of the mixed ancestor water left, which could be kept for his wife and children to use in the future.

Rumble!!!!

The endless coercion spread, but it was blocked by the Holy Monument World, otherwise this coercion alone could permeate the entire Dao Mountain Realm.

"I'm strong!"

Ye Tian found that he was much stronger than the Invincible Domain Ancestor in the early days, and he could pinch his previous self to death with his hand.

Moreover, his Holy Soul was also dozens of times stronger, after all, when his cultivation was improved, his Holy Soul naturally also improved.

However, this is not really the extreme!

Many Invincible Domain Ancestors have cultivated to the Consummation Realm, and they are only three or four steps of Invincible Domain Ancestor combat power, but in the future, they can slowly increase to two-step Invincible Domain Ancestor combat power or even one step of Invincible Domain Ancestor combat power.

That's because the body of the Invincible Domain Ancestor is too terrifying, and many Invincible Domain Ancestors can't fully exert their own strength.

It seems to be 100% powerful, but many times you can continue to control it.

After the Invincible Domain Ancestor cultivated to the consummation realm, it was a process of complete control.

And this kind of control is very difficult to cultivate, controlling the physical body to exert its own power, that is a very ordinary control, if you can exert ten times your own strength, it is very awesome control, if you control a hundred times your own strength, it can be called extremely demonic.

If you control 365 times your own power, you will reach your limit.

At this time, you can try to break the limit of the physical body and carry out an invincible domain body transformation.

At the beginning, the Gu Heng Domain Ancestor had completed the transformation of the Invincible Domain Body three times, and once he had completed the transformation of the Invincible Domain Body nine times, he could be promoted to the Superior Domain Ancestor.

And it is very difficult to control 365 times the strength of one's own body, for example, the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors did not do it, but it is also related to the fact that the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors have reached a half-step Ancestral Body.

In short, the stronger the physical body, the more difficult it is to control, and if the demon is to the extent that he has cultivated into an ancestral body, it will be even more difficult to control.

This is also the reason why the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors are much stronger than the Ancient Heng Domain Ancestors, but they have not broken the limit.

But the invincible domain ancestor of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, once the physical limit is broken in the future, the strength will be terrifying.

"I guess I'll try to control the power of my body after I have cultivated my ancestral body!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, he wanted to become the most powerful Invincible Domain Ancestor, Peerless Domain Ancestor, and Ancestor level, so he naturally had to reach an extremely terrifying level in every realm.
